tools.name: public.echo
tools.description: Echos the input parameters back in the response

tools.name: public.getAccessToken
tools.description: Returns an access token

tools.name: public.getAlbumById
tools.description: Returns a list of photos in an album.

tools.name: public.getAlbumContextById
tools.description: Returns next and previous photos for a photo in a set

tools.name: public.getAlbumsByPersonId
tools.description: Returns the albums belonging to the specified user

tools.name: public.getFavoritesByPersonId
tools.description: Returns a list of the user's favorite photos. Only photos which the calling user has permission to see are returned.

tools.name: public.getFavoritesContextById
tools.description: Returns next and previous favorites for a photo in a user's favorites

tools.name: public.getGalleryPhotosById
tools.description: Returns a list of photos in a gallery.

tools.name: public.getGroupById
tools.description: Get information about a group

tools.name: public.getGroupDiscussionsById
tools.description: Get a list of discussion topics in a group.

tools.name: public.getGroupPhotosById
tools.description: Returns a list of pool photos for a given group

tools.name: public.getGroupTopicById
tools.description: Get information about a group discussion topic

tools.name: public.getGroupTopicRepliesById
tools.description: Get information on a group topic reply

tools.name: public.getLicenseById
tools.description: Fetches a list of available photo licenses for Flickr

tools.name: public.getMediaByPersonId
tools.description: Return photos from the given user's photostream

tools.name: public.getMediaBySearch
tools.description: Return a list of photos matching some criteria.

tools.name: public.getPersonById
tools.description: Returns a person

tools.name: public.getPhotoById
tools.description: Returns a photo

tools.name: public.getPhotoExifById
tools.description: Retrieves a list of EXIF/TIFF/GPS tags for a given photo. The calling user must have permission to view the photo.

tools.name: public.getPhotolistContextById
tools.description: Returns next and previous photos in a photo list

tools.name: public.getPhotoSizesById
tools.description: Returns photo sizes

tools.name: public.getPhotostreamContextById
tools.description: Returns next and previous photos for a photo in a photostream

tools.name: public.getRequestToken
tools.description: Returns an oauth token and oauth token secret

tools.name: public.getRestMethodFlickrGroupsPoolsGetContext
tools.description: Returns next and previous photos for a photo in a group pool

tools.name: public.uploadPhoto
tools.description: Uploads a new photo to Flickr

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
